features: Don’t waste precious morning time untying your shower hose; The TwistStop flexible shower hose makes that frustrating experience a thing of the past; The flexible hose always keeps its shape making it easy to use and maintain

In developing the GROHE Long-Life Finish, we've brought our multilayered coating technology to perfection, and we pride ourselves in achieving a hard-wearing surface; On top of that, the surface is super easy to clean: a quick wipe with a microfibre cloth is all it takes to keep your tap looking immaculate, even after years of use
description: From the manufacturer QuickFix Vitalio Shower Hoses Shower hoses for any modern bathroom look GROHE Vitalio Shower hose will suit easily in any modern bathroom. Ideal for shower systems, shower rail sets and hand shower in the bathtub. GROHE QuickFix Shower Hoses have never been so easy to choose! What do you recommend when choosing between different sizes? The distance between the outlet and the resting position are key to check when choosing the length of your new hose for you bathroom. Typically a hose within a bathtub tends to be shorter 1.2m or 1.5m. For shower situation it’s often above 1.5m. What is twist stop doing? The feature makes using a hand shower frustration free as the hose doesn’t get twisted and feel must more natural when using it. One you have used a twist stop you will wonder how you ever showered without using one. Why are some of the Grohe hoses called long life? Grohe produces products for homes and commercial environment like hotel and Health clubs. Typically commercial environments have much higher usage and pressure exerted on them so the long life are perfect for this. Does it work with non GROHE Showers or hand showers? Yes as GROHE hoses have an universal connection G 1/2" x 1/2".
